name: critical-iceberg-compaction-stalled

query_condition.sql: SELECT table, MAX(value) AS last_success_ts FROM "iceberg_compact_last_success" WHERE _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours' GROUP BY table

description: An Iceberg table's last successful compaction is more than 2 hours ago. Small-file accumulation will degrade read performance. Investigate the nightly CronJob or the writer commit path.
